titleStmt.title: SII 22.357: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 357. (A.R. No. 357 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRĀKĀRA. TRIB. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶADĒVA—18th YEAR

summary.p: This registers a gift of puravu land, two mā in extent, at Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷachaturvēdimaṅgalam by Kaṉṉaṉ Edirilipperumāḷ alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Kaḍambarāyaṉ of Uṟattūrkūṟṟam in Kuṉṟuśūḻ-nāḍu stated to be a division of Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍa-vaḷanāḍu, to one Bālāśrayan Śiṅgaṉ Śiṅgaṉ alias Nāṟpatteṉṉāyira-nambi of Ādanūr, who was to provide offerings to the goddess Periya-Nāchchiyār during the early morning service in the temple at Tirunalakkuṉṟam in the same nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8vatu nāḷ 100 9 10 5- l Iraṭṭapāṭikoṇṭavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṉṟucūḻnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nā
yaṉār koyiṟ periyanācciyārkkut tiruppaḷḷi Eḻucci cantikkut tiru Amutupaṭikkum kaṟiamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum patitta patipattamāka cantirā Ādhittavaraiyum cellakkaṭavatākavum Iṉṉāṭṭu Uṟa
ttūrkūṟṟattuc cāra Araiyaṉ kaṉṉaṉ Etirilipperumāḷāṉa kulot tuṅkacoḻak kaṭamparāyaṉeṉ Ikkūṟṟattu śrī tevakaḷ tevaṉṉāṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷac caruppetimaṅkalattup pura
viṉpaṭi nilattil Ātaṉūr pālāḻrayaṉ ciṅkaṉ ciṅkaṉ tiruvaraṅkapāḷi yāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyiranampi nāḷippaṟṟāṉa vaṭakkil nilam kuṭiniṅkāt tevatāṉam kiḻakkuvayal nilam � pa piṭākai putuvayal 5 � kaṭṭaḷaik kiḻvayal
nilam 3pa Āka nilam 2pa Iṉṉilam Iraṇṭu māvum tiruccūlakkallu nāṭṭu vittu Ivvūr Aracai puṭam Iṭṭa kuṭimai paṟṟu maṟṟa Epperpaṭṭatuvum nāyaṉārkku nāṟpatteṇṇāyiranampiyeṉ cantirādhittavarai ceyvāṉāka
kalveṭṭikkuṭutteṉ kulottuṅkacoḻak kaṭamparāyaṉeṉ Ivai kulottuṅkacoḻak kaṭamparāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nampiyāṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai paṉmāyesvararaṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 22.357 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
